search_terms_used: protein requirements endurance runners systematic review
protein muscle repair running recovery leucine endurance
protein timing post exercise endurance athletes
coverage_notes: Strong coverage of protein requirements (IAAO method study + narrative review), supplementation effects (systematic review/meta-analysis + narrative review), protein-carbohydrate co-ingestion for recovery (review), nutrient timing (ISSN position stand), adaptive response to endurance training (perspective review), and plant vs animal protein comparison (meta-analysis). Includes 1 meta-analysis, 1 dose-response RCT, 1 clinical trial, and 5 reviews/position stands. Gap: no dedicated running-specific leucine RCT (leucine covered within broader reviews). Population mix: endurance-trained men dominate; limited female-specific data.

papers.title: Protein Nutrition for Endurance Athletes: A Metabolic Focus on Promoting Recovery and Training Adaptation
papers.notes: Reviewed metabolic rationale for protein recommendations in endurance athletes, proposing ~1.8 g/kg/day with higher intakes during carbohydrate-restricted training.

papers.title: Protein Requirements Are Elevated in Endurance Athletes after Exercise as Determined by the Indicator Amino Acid Oxidation Method
papers.notes: Used the indicator amino acid oxidation method to determine protein requirements in endurance-trained men during a controlled 3-day training period.

papers.title: Protein supplementation increases adaptations to endurance training: A systematic review and meta-analysis
papers.notes: Meta-analyzed 19 RCTs examining whether protein supplementation during endurance training improves VO2peak, lean mass, and time-trial performance.

papers.title: Dose-response effects of dietary protein on muscle protein synthesis during recovery from endurance exercise in young men: a double-blind randomized trial
papers.notes: Measured dose-response effects of 0-45g protein on muscle protein synthesis rates during recovery from endurance exercise in trained young men.

papers.title: International Society of Sports Nutrition Position Stand: protein and exercise
papers.journal: Journal of the International Society of Sports Nutrition
papers.notes: Published the ISSN consensus position on protein intake recommendations for physically active individuals, covering dosage, timing, source, and quality.

papers.title: Effects of Protein Supplementation on Performance and Recovery in Resistance and Endurance Training
papers.notes: Reviewed evidence on peri-exercise protein supplementation effects on performance and recovery in both resistance and endurance training contexts.

papers.title: Protein and the Adaptive Response With Endurance Training: Wishful Thinking or a Competitive Edge?
papers.notes: Examined whether dietary protein augments endurance-specific training adaptations including mitochondrial biogenesis, capillarization, and oxygen-transport protein synthesis.

papers.title: Animal Protein versus Plant Protein in Supporting Lean Mass and Muscle Strength: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials
papers.notes: Meta-analyzed RCTs comparing animal vs plant protein sources on lean mass and muscle strength outcomes.
